category_sources: Official project page describes itex2MML as a stream filter that converts embedded itex equations to MathML.
source_facts.description says it converts itex equations to MathML.
display_name_sources: Official project page uses the name itex2MML and lists the current itex2MML version.
docs_sources: Official itex Command Summary page documents supported commands.
Official project page contains installation and usage notes.
repo_sources: Official Instiki documentation gives the Bazaar branch URL for itexToMML.
Official project page links to source code and a repository browser.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was researched.
tags_sources: Official project page documents command-line stream-filter behavior and TeX/MathML usage.
source_facts.description identifies a text filter converting itex equations to MathML.
